input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.10.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.10.3
            TITLE: vehicles that are excluded from design judging or refused judging will receive zero points for

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.10.3: Vehicles that are excluded from Design judging or refused judging will receive zero points for
S.4.10.3 Vehicles that are excluded from Design judging or refused judging will receive zero points for 
Design, and may receive penalty points.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 125 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
D - DYNAMIC EVENTS

final_answer: Vehicles that are excluded from Design judging or refused judging will receive zero points for Design, and may receive penalty points.
